stemHtml: An aircraft is at 400 ft AGL on an approach. What can the TCAS generate regarding an 'intruder'?

options.a: RA, red solid circle, aural alert.
options.b: TA, yellow/amber solid circle, no aural alert.
options.c: RA, red solid square, no aural alert.
options.d: TA, yellow/amber hollow circle, aural alert.
